title: Forestry N Stuff
description: A collection of mods providing: food, worldgen and now Bees
body:
This collection of mods is geared towards passive and aesthetic interactions rather than the usual slog to beat the bosses as fast as possible

this pack includes create, forestry, Ars and Botania, plus an over-abundance of food mods and world gen, including the YUNGs suite.

this pack aims to update with the latest version of Forestry: Community Edition

Server Versions available on request - Hosted server address included

reach out on discord to Dan Delion (dandelion1608) for more
